data.title: 国际服活动「Secret Midnight Party: The Chimes of Tag」礼物兑换码 #2
data.summary: Sensei, the second day of the Secret Midnight Party has arrived! It’s your chance to gift the studen
data.body:
Sensei, the second day of the Secret Midnight Party has arrived!
It’s your chance to gift the students a Selection Box and a Large Whole Cake, and earn Relationship Points too!
Enter the coupon code now and claim your rewards~ 🎁

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2944260
